zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn Ap Morgan於1350年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾時，他的父親Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn32歲，母親Mallt verch Rhun12歲。他於從1383年1月9日到1384年1月8日與Jonet Verch Dafydd在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德加結婚。他去世於1448年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特雷德加享年98歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn Ap Morgan was born in 1350, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn, was 32 and his mother, Mallt verch Rhun, was 12. He married Jonet Verch Dafydd from 9 January 1383 to 8 January 1384, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales. He died in 1448, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn Ap Morgan est né en 1350, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mallt verch Rhun, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Jonet Verch Dafydd du 9 janvier 1383 au 8 janvier 1384, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles. Il est décédé en 1448, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn Ap Morgan(이)가 1350년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mallt verch Rhun(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1383년 1월 9일부터 1384년 1월 8일까지 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 Jonet Verch Dafydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1448년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn Ap Morgan родился в 1350 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mallt verch Rhun, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet Verch Dafydd с 9 января 1383 по 8 января 1384 в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс. Он умер в 1448 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет.

es.Tredegyr, Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales: Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn Ap Morgan nació en 1350, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Morgan ap Llewelyn, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mallt verch Rhun, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Jonet Verch Dafydd desde 9 de enero de 1383 hasta 8 de enero de 1384, en Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales. Murió en 1448, en Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años.
